channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why women’s earnings plateau in their 30s while men’s just keep growing through their 40s: It’s not just motherhood
item.description: She enters the workforce at a disadvantage. By the time she turns 35, it's something structural and the numbers make it impossible to look away.

item.title: Time on his side: Michael Dell the real business icon as Icahn the activist recedes from view
item.description: In retrospect, the titanic battle between Dell and Icahn likely marked a turning point in activist investing.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg, Adam Mosseri’s words used against them in never-before-seen videos airing in addiction trial
item.description: "I think that there’s over 2 billion people on Instagram, which means there are millions of teens on Instagram."

item.title: What our time-management styles say about productivity and gender
item.description: Picture two scenes. In the first, a Swiss train pulls away at exactly 10:02 a.m. If you’re not on the platform, it’s already too late . Precision is r...

item.title: Why AI Literacy Is Now Essential for Marketing Leaders
item.description: The future of marketing belongs to AI power users.

item.title: 5 Women Building Innovative Solutions to Social Problems
item.description: This Women’s History Month, consider how your lived experience can be a catalyst for innovation.

item.title: Asia faces an energy shock from the Iran war and a closed Strait of Hormuz, as governments halt exports and draw down stockpiles
item.description: Asian countries like China, Korea and Japan have tried to diversify their energy imports, yet they still depend on oil and gas from the Middle East.

item.title: Robinhood joins the high-fee premium credit card race with an invite-only Platinum offering
item.description: Stock trading platform Robinhood has announced its newest offering: the Robinhood Platinum Card. The upgraded option comes two years after the company...

item.title: Meta CEO Zuckerberg takes issue with the word ‘addictive’ in deposition shown at landmark trial
item.description: Jurors in a bellwether trial about the impacts of social media on children watched a deposition of Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg on Wednesday that explored...

item.title: 5 Ways AI Hiring Tools Are Scaring Off Great Candidates (and How to Fix It)
item.description: New AI tools might make recruiting faster, but is the end result really a net positive?

item.title: Millennials don’t want to quit. They want to get laid off
item.description: The job market is tough right now: AI résumé filters , the rise of ghost jobs , and waves of industry-wide layoffs . Many workers cling tightly to the...

item.title: How AI Is Reshaping the Chemical Industry
item.description: The technology enables new services and efficiencies.

item.title: Google Gemini was a deadly ‘AI wife’ for this 36-year-old who resisted its call for a ‘mass casualty’ event before his death, lawsuit says
item.description: “Our models generally perform well in these types of challenging conversations ... but unfortunately AI models are not perfect,” Google said.

item.title: In recovery? Here’s how to handle social drinking situations in the workplace
item.description: Picture this: It’s lunchtime in the 1960s, and you’re out with co-workers enjoying not one, not two, but three cocktails with your meal . While the th...

item.title: Why “Good Enough” Security Is the Smart Growth Strategy
item.description: This counterintuitive business case will save you money and still keep you safe.
